hero_subtitle: SFTY provides risk leaders with a consolidated view across onboarding, monitoring, and case workflows to strengthen control and maintain audit-ready compliance.
trust_card_1_value: Identity checks connected to onboarding decisions
trust_card_2_value: Corporate verification, UBO review and entity risk
trust_card_3_value: Wallet and transaction monitoring in one workflow
trust_card_4_value: Message routing, completeness checks and exception handling
trust_card_5_value: Regulatory changes mapped to internal rule
trust_card_6_value: Decision logs and evidence for every review
problem_title: Executive oversight fades across compliance silos
problem_description: Leadership teams struggle to gain a unified view of compliance risk as onboarding, monitoring, and case management data remain separated across multiple systems. This fragmentation slows risk detection, complicates audit readiness, and clouds strategic decision-making.
problem_point_1_value: KYC, KYB, KYT and Travel Rule outputs sit in separate tools
problem_point_2_value: Teams move data between dashboards, spreadsheets and internal notes
problem_point_3_value: Regulatory changes are hard to map into internal workflows
problem_point_4_value: Evidence and decision history are difficult to reconstruct later
solution_description: SFTY consolidates onboarding, monitoring, case workflows, alerts, and provider outputs into a unified compliance dashboard to deliver executives clear visibility and stronger audit evidence for risk oversight.
workflow_title: From provider outputs to risk overview
workflow_description: SFTY aggregates compliance checks across onboarding, monitoring and cases to deliver executives a consolidated risk view with audit-ready evidence and reporting.
workflow_step_1_description: KYC, KYB, KYT and screening outputs enter SFTY
workflow_step_2_description: Risk rules route checks into the right workflow
workflow_step_3_description: A case opens with customer, wallet and provider context
workflow_step_4_description: Teams review, decide and record the outcome
workflow_step_5_description: Logs, decisions and reports stay ready for audit
why_sfty_title: Not another dashboard. One risk control view
why_sfty_description: SFTY gives executives a unified compliance operating view by connecting onboarding, monitoring and case workflows into audit-ready decisions and risk visibility.
why_sfty_card_1_description: Work above existing KYC, KYB, KYT and Travel Rule tools
why_sfty_card_2_description: Turn disconnected outputs into structured reviews and cases
why_sfty_card_3_description: Preserve evidence, reviewer actions and decision history
why_sfty_card_4_description: Give compliance, risk and leadership one operating view
authority_description: SFTY supports VASPs with controlled provider orchestration and audit-ready evidence to enhance compliance risk visibility and strengthen bank due diligence at the enterprise level.
authority_card_1_description: Connect KYC, KYB, KYT, Travel Rule and screening providers into one workflow
authority_card_2_description: Preserve provider outputs, reviewer notes, decisions and supporting records
authority_card_3_description: Prepare clearer compliance evidence for banks, partners and external review
authority_card_4_description: Support private environments, permissions, integrations and internal governance
ask_sfty_placeholder: How can SFTY show compliance risk across workflows
ask_sfty_chip_1_message: Explain how onboarding and case risks appear in dashboards
ask_sfty_chip_2_message: Show how audit-ready evidence supports executive risk reviews
ask_sfty_chip_3_message: Describe how SFTY connects provider data for risk visibility
ask_sfty_helper_text: AI assistant for product, deployment and compliance questions
faq_description: Clear answers on provider orchestration, Travel Rule workflows, audit evidence and enterprise compliance operations.
faq_1_question: What is SFTY for VASP executives?
faq_1_answer: SFTY provides VASP executives with a connected compliance risk dashboard across onboarding, monitoring and case workflows, delivering scalable visibility and decision clarity for operational and regulatory oversight.
faq_2_question: How does SFTY show compliance risk?
faq_2_answer: SFTY aggregates provider outputs into structured workflows and dashboards, showing multi-jurisdiction compliance risk, case status, onboarding risk scores and regulatory rule alignment in one operating view.
faq_3_question: How does SFTY preserve audit evidence?
faq_3_answer: SFTY preserves decision logs, case history and evidence packages for audit readiness, enabling executives to review how compliance decisions were made and supported across workflows.
faq_4_question: Can SFTY integrate with existing providers?
faq_4_answer: Yes. SFTY connects existing KYC, KYB, KYT, Travel Rule and screening providers into one compliance layer without disrupting current systems or workflows.
faq_5_answer: No. SFTY acts as a compliance control layer above providers, turning their outputs into structured workflows, cases, evidence and audit-ready reports.
final_title: Bring executive risk insights into one view
final_description: Review how SFTY consolidates onboarding, monitoring and case risks into audit-ready compliance dashboards for leadership oversight.
footer_description: Supervisory and compliance control layer for digital asset markets, businesses and regulated institutions.
footer_contact_title: For supervisory, compliance and deployment discussions.
footer_legal_notice: This page is for informational purposes only and does not constitute legal, regulatory or compliance advice. SFTY deployment depends on jurisdiction, client requirements and applicable laws.
